div.style: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 32px; justify-content: space-between;

h4.style: font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: #2b2017; margin: 0 0 16px;

ul.style: list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;

a.style: font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #6b5e52; text-decoration: none;
font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #6b5e52; text-decoration: none;
font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #6b5e52; text-decoration: none;
font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #6b5e52; text-decoration: none;
font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #6b5e52; text-decoration: none;
